prompt_text:
### Demographics: 73-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 22 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Urolithiasis (status post lithotripsy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF (No); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (mother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 77.3 kg; Height 158.7 cm; BMI 30.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/83 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.7%; 9 months ago 7.3%; 6 months ago 6.8%; 3 months ago 6.3%; current 5.8%), FPG (12 months ago 207mg/dL; 9 months ago 164mg/dL; 6 months ago 134mg/dL; 3 months ago 121mg/dL; current 110mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 76.8kg; 9 months ago 77.1kg; 6 months ago 75.1kg; 3 months ago 76.3kg; current 77.3kg), Height (12 months ago 158.7cm; 9 months ago 158.7cm; 6 months ago 158.7cm; 3 months ago 158.7cm; current 158.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 30.0kg/m²; current 30.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 128mmHg; 9 months ago 131mmHg; 6 months ago 133mmHg; 3 months ago 133mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 85mmHg; 9 months ago 87mmHg; 6 months ago 87mmHg; 3 months ago 85mmHg; current 83mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 13U/L; 9 months ago 13U/L; 6 months ago 12U/L; 3 months ago 19U/L; current 18U/L), AST (12 months ago 23U/L; 9 months ago 21U/L; 6 months ago 28U/L; 3 months ago 25U/L; current 27U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 6.8mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 6.7mL/min/1.73m²; current 7mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 736mg/g; 9 months ago 954mg/g; 6 months ago 733mg/g; 3 months ago 902mg/g; current 752mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 88mg/dL; 9 months ago 86mg/dL; 6 months ago 87mg/dL; 3 months ago 86mg/dL; current 90mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 53mg/dL; 9 months ago 52mg/dL; 6 months ago 52mg/dL; 3 months ago 49mg/dL; current 51mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 182mg/dL; 9 months ago 164mg/dL; 6 months ago 164mg/dL; 3 months ago 182mg/dL; current 172mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 11.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
